alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_MedicalFalsePositiveRate_High
alerts.title: High Medical Payment False-Positive Rate
alerts.message: Medical payment false-positive rate is above 3% threshold. This indicates the model is blocking legitimate emergency payments.

annotations.description: Medical vertical false-positive rate has exceeded 3%. Immediate action required to prevent patient impact.
annotations.impact: Patients unable to complete emergency payments

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_Latency_High
alerts.title: Payment Fraud ML Inference Latency High
alerts.message: Payment fraud ML inference latency is above 50ms threshold. This impacts payment UX.

annotations.description: P95 latency for payment fraud inference is above 50ms. Consider scaling ML infrastructure or optimizing model.

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_Latency_Critical
alerts.title: Payment Fraud ML Inference Latency Critical
alerts.message: Payment fraud ML inference latency is above 100ms threshold. Critical payment path degradation.

annotations.description: P95 latency for payment fraud inference is above 100ms. Immediate action required.
annotations.impact: Severe payment checkout degradation, potential revenue loss

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_BlockRate_Medical_High
alerts.title: Medical Payment Block Rate High
alerts.message: Medical payment block rate is above 5% threshold. May indicate model degradation.

annotations.description: Medical payment block rate has exceeded 5%. Review model performance and consider threshold adjustment.
annotations.impact: Increased payment rejections in medical vertical

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_CacheHitRate_Low
alerts.title: Payment Fraud Cache Hit Rate Low
alerts.message: Payment fraud cache hit rate is below 50%. Idempotency optimization not working effectively.

annotations.description: Cache hit rate for payment fraud checks is below 50%. Check Redis configuration and TTL settings.
annotations.impact: Increased ML inference load and latency

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_EmergencyBlockRate_High
alerts.title: Emergency Payment Block Rate High
alerts.message: Emergency payment block rate is above 2%. Critical for patient safety.

annotations.description: Emergency payment block rate has exceeded 2%. This is a patient safety issue.
annotations.impact: CRITICAL: Patients unable to complete emergency payments

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_ShadowModel_Stale
alerts.title: Payment Fraud Shadow Model Stale
alerts.message: Payment fraud shadow model has been running for more than 48h without promotion.

annotations.description: Shadow model has been running for more than 48 hours. Consider promotion or retirement.

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_QueueBacklog_High
alerts.title: Payment Fraud Check Queue Backlog High
alerts.message: Payment fraud check queue backlog is above 1000 jobs. Processing delay.

annotations.description: Payment fraud check queue has more than 1000 pending jobs. Scale workers or investigate processing bottlenecks.

alerts.name: PaymentFraudML_QueueBacklog_Critical
alerts.title: Payment Fraud Check Queue Backlog Critical
alerts.message: Payment fraud check queue backlog is above 5000 jobs. Critical processing delay.

annotations.description: Payment fraud check queue has more than 5000 pending jobs. Immediate scaling required.
annotations.impact: Severe payment processing delays, potential service disruption
